role_summary: Principal — Strategic Communications & Storytelling at Ceremony. Runs special ops communication for organizations needing buy-in across complex hierarchies. Primary Lilly client contact: Scott Caltabiano at GFD.

Andy reached out 2026-03-02: 'AI is going to change how white collar work is done.' Deep problem space knowledge — built PortOps, understands data gaps. Existing trust with Scott. Can facilitate direct A&A/Scott engagement.
